headline: N35 classifier+mnemonic+sentinel fix generalises across kernel shapes — vec-mul source-to-silicon bit-exact
predecessor: rfc071_p4_n34_numeric_eq_pass_2026_05_21 (N34 vec-add first PASS) + N45 (CSE) commit 830e44c0

context.ptx_size_delta_vs_n34: -346 bytes (-14.2%, vec_mul has fewer cvt redundancies via N45 CSE)

kernel_shape_delta.from_n34: @gpu_kernel fn my_test_kernel(a:[f64], b:[f64], c:[f64], n:i64) { ... c[i] = a[i] + b[i] }
kernel_shape_delta.to_n50: @gpu_kernel fn vec_mul(a:[f64], b:[f64], c:[f64], n:i64) { ... c[i] = a[i] * b[i] }
deltas: everything else identical (4 params, bounds check, IndexGet/IndexSet, to_i64 gid widen)

n35_fix_generalisation_evidence.claim: N35's classifier+mnemonic+sentinel fix (c29359ab) + N45 CSE (830e44c0) work on a DIFFERENT kernel than the one used to land them
verified_paths: STMT_ASSIGN op='index' (IndexGet) — emits mul.lo.s64 + add.s64 + ld.global.f64 for BOTH a[i] AND b[i] reads (2x ld.global.f64 in body)
STMT_ASSIGN op='index_set' (IndexSet) — emits mul.lo.s64 + add.s64 + st.global.f64 for c[i] = ... write
Classifier op='index' exclusion — F64 dst not contaminated by U64 base pointer (loaded value lands in .reg .f64 %fd15 / %fd17)
ld.param prologue — 4x ld.param.u64 from vec_mul_param_0..3 at entry block ($L_0)
N45 CSE — `mul.lo.s64 %rd_idx_off_10_8, %rd10, 8` SHARED across both IndexGet's and the IndexSet (1 mul instead of 3)
to_i64 lowering — single `cvt.s64.s32 %rd10, %r9` (CSE'd: gid widened once, used 3x)
Symbol-form `<` comparison — `setp.lt.s64 %p11, %rd10, %rd3` (N32 fix at 3899dbdf accepts symbol form)
Predicate-bank @ predicate — `@%p11 bra` NOT `@%fd11 bra` (N17 fix retained)
FP64 arithmetic payload — `mul.f64 %fd18, %fd15, %fd17;  // binop *` (the NEW kernel-specific op; everything else identical to N34)
n35_fix_generalisation_evidence.verdict: GENERALISED — N35 fix is NOT kernel-specific. The compiler correctly lowered the new fixture without any compiler-source changes; only the host C launcher's CPU reference was edited (a[i] + b[i] -> a[i] * b[i]).

honest_scope_g3.worktree_recovery: On entry, compiler/codegen/nvptx_target.hexa had 928 lines silently wiped vs HEAD (sub-agent worktree leak per feedback_subagent_worktree_leak_pattern). Recovered via `git stash push -- compiler/codegen/nvptx_target.hexa` to restore HEAD content. Stash labelled 'n50_wipe_recovery_2026_05_21'. NO compiler edits, only restoration.
honest_scope_g3.self_main_rebuild: Built /tmp/hexa_n50_driver from self/main.hexa in 7.64s user (no OOM, no Path B import issue). Mac arm64 1552128 bytes.
honest_scope_g3.host_c_changes_vs_n34: Only 3 lines functionally differ: kernel name string (cuModuleGetFunction), PTX_PATH (different file basename), CPU ref op (* instead of +). No host-side fix needed.
honest_scope_g3.fp64_mul_bit_exact: FP64 multiplication is well-defined per IEEE 754 — no rounding-mode ambiguity, no FMA contraction risk (single mul, not fused add+mul). max_abs_diff=0 expected and observed.
